item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: My favorite part of this is seeing SCP 507 as a Foundation member!

item.title: I don't quite get it
item.content:encoded: SCP-1000 has offworld colonies, and Foundation-like organization, and after find out what happened to their kinds back on Earth, they want to revenge and send this Odd Entity-777? And how is it involved with the Ortrothan? What happened to those cosmonauts?

Alright, third choice! Woo-hoo!

Thanks to the mods for the contest and to the people who voted, up or down. The fact that so many people read my article is a great feeling.

Congrats to Tanhony! You were my second choice to win! Besides myself, of course.

And to all past and future readers coming upon this message, I hope you enjoy the article and I look forward to providing you with more stories in the future!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: One of the researchers being named Dan Howell should probably be changed considering that's the name of a real youtube persona. otherwise great article!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I want to see a whole freaking canon where 507 gets to live out his dream of being an employee of the foundation and not just a contained object (albeit one of the best treated). I swear I got misty just thinking about it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I like the use of 507 here (though I question why the rest of the team wasn't briefed on who he was before the mission) and overall it's not a bad piece, but the alien doppleganger is rather cliche and I feel this would be stronger if the piece forged its own backstory rather than shoehorning in 1000 at the end.
I'm just happy 507 got his wish to be a foundation staff member granted.

item.title: Deimos
item.content:encoded: I'm just gonna go ahead and be the first to say that SCP-4606 is already called Deimos, so you might want to note that.

item.title: Deimos
item.content:encoded:
“Then their civilization fell… Supposedly a trickster forest god showed humanity favor, showed us the master's tools and how to use them. Why we did it, we don't know. Perhaps they hunted us, perhaps we were simply afraid.”

Alternative Choices:
1. SCP-5500
2. SCP-5600
3. SCP-5775
4. SCP-5001
5. SCP-4921

Hope you enjoy!
